name: Varicella (Chickenpox) Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for varicella (chickenpox) vaccines including monovalent varicella vaccine (Varivax) and combination MMRV (ProQuad). Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measure. Requires 1 dose by age 2 (at 12-15 months) and 2 doses for adolescents.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Measles, mumps, rubella, and varicella virus vaccine (MMRV, ProQuad)
Varicella virus vaccine (VAR), live, for subcutaneous use
Measles, mumps, rubella, and varicella vaccine (MMRV), live, for subcutaneous use
